allow:
Bash(git init && git add -A && git commit -m "Initial commit: project draft and implementation plan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git add .gitignore client/index.html client/package.json client/tsconfig.json client/vite.config.ts client/tailwind.config.js client/postcss.config.js client/src/ server/package.json server/tsconfig.json server/vitest.config.ts server/src/ docs/plan.md)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: implement core game engine, multi-platform UI, AI system, and rules

- Game engine with state machine, 6 roles \(werewolf, villager, seer, witch, hunter, guard\)
- Support 6-16 player flexible configuration with preset configs
- WebSocket real-time communication with room management
- React frontend with responsive design for desktop/mobile
- AI agent system via OpenRouter API supporting 6 LLM models
- Rules page with complete game rules and role descriptions
- Settings page for OpenRouter API token configuration
- QR code generation for LAN mobile access
- 23 unit tests all passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add .gitignore server/src/voice/ server/src/routes/api.ts client/src/pages/Game.tsx client/src/components/PlayerGrid.tsx client/src/components/PhaseDisplay.tsx client/src/components/VoiceInput.tsx client/src/hooks/useSpeechRecognition.ts client/src/hooks/useAudioPlayer.ts client/src/index.css)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add voice system \(TTS/STT\) and enhance UI for video recording

- TTS: Edge TTS integration with 6 distinct AI voice profiles
- TTS: Narrator voice for game phase announcements
- STT: Web Speech API integration for human player voice input
- VoiceInput component with real-time transcription display
- Auto-play narrator voice on phase transitions
- Enhanced CSS animations: death, role reveal, selection pulse
- 16:9 recording safe area, larger fonts, seat numbers
- Phase-specific background gradients
- Mobile responsive improvements
- 23 tests still passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add .gitignore client/package-lock.json server/package-lock.json .claude/settings.local.json && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
chore: add lock files and update gitignore
EOF
\)")
Bash(cd /home/wab/workspace/mafia/server && node -e "const e = require\('edge-tts'\); console.log\(typeof e, Object.keys\(e\)\)" 2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: address all Codex review issues from Round 0

Build fixes:
- Fix edge-tts import to use named export `tts\(\)` function
- Add SpeechRecognition browser API type declarations
- Add `device` field to PlayerGrid interface
- Fix unused variable in Tutorial.tsx

Game engine:
- Add Fool \(白痴\) role with exile immunity + vote loss mechanic
- Restore 16-player preset to 5w/6v/5g \(including fool\) per plan
- Implement PK voting: tie → PK speech → re-vote → 2nd tie peaceful
- Add turn ownership: non-role players get "未轮到你操作" rejection
- Add speaker queue for discussion/PK phases
- Add phase deadlines and timeout constants \(PHASE_TIMEOUTS\)
- Deep-copy state in getState\(\) to prevent external mutation

Socket/networking:
- Split human join_room and add_ai events to fix identity corruption
- Wire AIManager into game loop: auto-trigger AI decisions on phases
- AI generates speech and broadcasts during discussion turns
- Add phase timer with auto-advance on timeout
- Enforce canSpeak\(\) for chat messages

AI system:
- Validate OpenRouter API token on save \(test call to /api/v1/models\)
- Reject AI creation when token not configured
- Add pk_speech/pk_voting to AI phase descriptions

Client UI:
- Show all player roles on game_over \(identity reveal\)
- Add countdown timer display in PhaseDisplay
- Add PK phase display support
- Add Fool role to all role dictionaries \(emoji, name, color\)
- Add interactive Tutorial page \(10-step guided walkthrough\)
- Link tutorial from Home page
- Pass phaseDeadline/currentSpeaker to components

Tests:
- 30 tests passing \(up from 23\)
- New: 16-player fool config, deep-copy state, PK tie detection
- New: turn ownership rejection, phase deadline, speaker permissions
- Fix: remove no-op guard test, eliminate state mutation in tests
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add .claude/settings.local.json && git commit -m "chore: update local settings")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: resolve Round 1 review issues - AI config, last words, PK frontend, voice

1. Unified AI config: shared config store synced between REST and socket
   - Settings save -> global store -> add_ai reads from global store
   - No more broken config chain between Settings page and Lobby

2. Fixed last words phase: dead players speak, alive players cannot
   - canSpeak\(\) checks alive status per phase type
   - LAST_WORDS builds speaker queue from deaths list
   - Client correctly allows dead player voice in last_words

3. PK frontend complete: pk_speech and pk_voting fully interactive
   - ActionPanel shows voting UI for pk_voting phase
   - PlayerGrid allows target selection in pk_voting
   - ChatPanel allows input during pk_speech
   - Game.tsx VoiceInput enabled during pk_speech

4. Fixed AI voice playback: use msg.aiModel directly, no stale closure
   - ChatMessage interface includes aiModel field
   - Handler reads aiModel from message, not gameState

5. AI PK decisions: dedicated PK_VOTING prompt and real retry
   - AIAgent.buildPrompt\(\) has PK_VOTING branch with candidate list
   - Fallback selects randomly from pkCandidates
   - triggerAIActions retries up to 3 times with fallback

6. AI memory: all player/AI speech written to AI agent memories
   - Human chat_message writes to all AI agents' memory
   - AI speech writes to other AI agents' memory + own memory
   - Memory consumed in subsequent decide/generateSpeech prompts

7. Tests: 32/32 passing, new coverage for last words and AI memory
EOF
\)")
